description: If all you need is a toned butt and hamstrings but hate those morning walks in toners, then this Tone Up slippers from skechers is perfect for you. Designed with balance pods to reduce impact on the joints and provide a more natural walking surface, these slippers are a great way to tone up when walking around the house, to a shop or to catch up with close pals. Heel height: 2" Upper Full-grain leather upper strap with a toe separator and mid-foot instep buckled strap for a more customised Fit and comfort Elastic panel under the buckle for a better fit Stitch accents on the straps for style, with soft fabric inner lining Cushioned and contoured foam footbed for all-day comfort Heel gel comfort pad and rounded, smooth toe post for added comfort Outsole Flexible outsole made of TPR for absolute grip and traction on various surfaces slipper care Wipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dust Do not machine wash or store in direct sunlight
